seoTitle: Wurruk vs Wy Yung — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wurruk and Wy Yung. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wurruk vs Wy Yung: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wurruk and Wy Yung.
heading: Wurruk vs Wy Yung — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wurruk, Victoria and Wy Yung, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wurruk has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Wy Yung (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wurruk or Wy Yung safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wurruk has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Wy Yung scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wurruk scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Wy Yung scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wurruk or Wy Yung?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wurruk has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
